sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 93:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 93:1
items.html: In the departure of the lights of the first expansion, called Partzuf Keter. For this reason‎, it is called the departure of the light of Keter. (Inner Light, Item‎ 6)
